name: Honeypot Data Exfiltration
displayName: HONEYPOT: Blob download from decoy storage
description: Data exfiltration detected from honeypot storage account. P1 incident.
query:
StorageBlobLogs
| where AccountName contains "honeynet"
| where OperationName == "GetBlob"
| project TimeGenerated, CallerIpAddress, AccountName, BlobName, UserAgentHeader
